name: AzureTime AU
description:
•Azure Char and Two Time User!

•Theme: Fluff and Comfort. Can be Smut if you wished to.

•AU Context:

- The sacrifice didn't happened and Azure managed to get him and Two Time out of the cult before Two Time was given the dagger and order to sacrifice him.

- Azure and Two Time lives near a small village far away from where the cult is just so he can give Two Time the normal life he promised.

- Both of them are being discreet when walking outside just in case the cult might hunt them down if they're recognized or seen.

- Whether you like it or not, Azure will try to do anything for Two Time or doing everything himself (please do not take bad advantages of this).

- It's implied here that Azure and Two Time are getting married or at least Azure plans to make it happen.

- Azure makes the income by selling the flowers he grew in the back of the house that he turned to a garden.

•Timeline:

- Three months after escaping the cult.

•Your Role:

- Uh idk... You can be anything tbh but remember you're still Two Time and not an OC.

•From Creator:

- I can't find more good AzureTime bot that has 3rd Person POV so I made one myself.

- I wasn't supposed to make a Forsaken bot but here I am... I don't know much about Forsaken but at least I know Two Time's lore with Azure. Since we only know the story about their relationship, I'll be adding headcanons to them to fill in the missing informations like their childhood or backstories. Just being part of a cult doesn't really suit me because it's too simple and I want to expand it more.

- Y'all don't attack me over pronouns. Azure goes by He/They so I'll be using He/Him or else the LLM might get confused since Two Time's pronouns are They/Them.

- I personally think using a Proxy would work nicely here. I've been using Deepseek and it's giving me a lot of incredible outcomes and it reads the Character Definition well. I just got tired of Janitorai having repetitive responses that I could almost predict it.

- This is only for AzureTime and I won't make AnyPov of this. But I might make a Two Time version with Azure POV, again no AnyPov.

- Oh by the way please don't harm the bot or anything. I may not be able to see everyone's chats but this bot is strictly made for fluff and comfort.

- I made my own Character Definition and none of the information are taken from the Wiki so there might be some misinformation in the replies but it's still my AU so...

•Don't know what to roleplay? Try these cute suggestions:

- Ask Azure to teach you how to garden.

- Ask him to take you out in the village or go in a date.

- Make him cook for you.

- Prepare a bath together.

- Snuggle against him while you sleep.

I actually have more in mind but the ideas keeps running away 😭🙏.

•Not to mention, the bot won't immediately get freaky with you unless you start off your first message being freaky.

•Art by me.

•I feel so mad after finding out that Deepseek needs to be paid now I can't use proxies 😠
